hero.name: Benjamin Maciel
hero.subtitle: Front-End Developer focused on performance, usability and real business impact.
hero.tagline2: 18 years old • Brazil • Global mindset • Building scalable interfaces.
hero.bio: Front-End Developer with 3 years of real business experience. Specialized in interfaces that convert.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Who is Benjamin Maciel
about.bio1:
I didn’t start by just learning to code.
I started by trying to understand systems.
about.bio2: From an early age, my focus was on understanding how technology can solve real business problems. I’m not interested in just building beautiful interfaces — I want to build solutions that work, perform well, and generate real impact.
about.bio3: I’m 18, hold a technical IT degree, and have hands-on experience in a real business environment. I’ve worked on interface development, marketplace structuring, internal systems, and operational improvements. My focus today is Front-End — with product and business vision.
Focus on performance, usability, and conversion. Every CSS line and every React component exists for a reason.

timeline.title: First steps in code
timeline.desc: Learned programming with Scratch and Codebuddy at age 12 at UNASP-EC.

timeline.title: LEGO Robotics
timeline.desc: Competed in robotics competitions using LEGO kits, developing logic and teamwork.

timeline.title: Technical IT Degree + Rebranding
timeline.desc: Started IT technical course at UNASP-EC and executed the full rebranding of Zenith Lacres.

timeline.title: Drone + Marketplaces
timeline.desc: Certified as drone operator by Futuriste Drone. Launched the company on 5 marketplaces.

timeline.title: Graduation Project
timeline.desc: Developed the final technical project 100% solo — design, frontend, and backend. Top grade achieved.

timeline.title: ERP + Information Systems Degree
timeline.desc: Building an internal multi-CNPJ management platform and starting B.Sc. in Information Systems.

items.name: Zenith Internal Platform
items.desc: Custom ERP with multi-CNPJ inventory control, internal corporate chat, and automated price management. In active production.

items.name: Rebranding & Marketplaces
items.desc: Full visual identity overhaul for Zenith Lacres and launch on 5 digital marketplaces. Result: R$0 to R$10,000 in sales in 3 months.

items.name: Graduation Project — Full Stack
items.desc: Technical graduation project developed entirely solo. Design, frontend, and backend from scratch. Achieved top grade.

items.name: Personal Portfolio
items.desc: Interactive portfolio with Framer Motion animations, simulated terminal, boot loader, and custom design system. Trilingual (PT/EN/ES).

cards.title: Gap Analyst
cards.desc: I observe processes to identify inefficiencies before writing a single line of code.

cards.title: Global Vision
cards.desc: 17 countries visited. I bring international perspective to design, UX, and digital strategy.

cards.title: Real Execution
cards.desc: I'm not theoretical: everything I learn goes into real production with measurable impact.

cards.title: Multidisciplinary
cards.desc: Code + design + marketing + operations. I understand the whole product, not just my layer.

cards.title: Early by Choice
cards.desc: I chose real experience over theory. 3 years at a company before turning 18.

cards.title: Speed Learner
cards.desc: I learn frameworks in days, not months. I prefer official documentation in English.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.cta: I'm open to internships, freelance work, and projects. Send me a message.
contact.availability: Availability: Monday to Friday (hours to be agreed).
contact.sent: Message sent! I'll be in touch soon.
contact.msgPlaceholder: Hi Benjamin, I'd like to talk about…
contact.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.

mindset.headline: I build interfaces that solve business problems — not just look good.
mindset.sub: Every component is designed with performance, usability and scalability in mind.
mindset.global: Business trips across 17 countries — international market exposure since age 15.

cards.title: Problem Identification
cards.desc: Before writing code, I map the process. I identify the gap, its cost, and the potential impact of the solution.

cards.title: Solution Structuring
cards.desc: I break the problem into modules. Define the MVP, the minimal architecture, and the implementation sequence.

cards.title: Performance First
cards.desc: Optimized loading, lazy loading, memoization. Performance isn't optimization — it's a minimum requirement.

cards.title: UX + Conversion
cards.desc: Every button, spacing, and visual hierarchy exists with intent. Interface that converts sells more.

techstack.sub: What I use, why I use it, and what I build with each technology.

items.name: React
items.desc: Component-driven architecture, hooks, state management, and optimized re-renders.

items.name: Next.js
items.desc: App Router, SSR, SSG, image optimization, and internationalized routes (this portfolio).

items.name: TypeScript
items.desc: Static typing for scalable systems with fewer production bugs.

items.name: Tailwind CSS
items.desc: Utility-first styling. Consistent, responsive design system at project scale.

items.name: Node.js
items.desc: REST APIs, WebSocket, and server-side business logic (ERP system).

items.name: MySQL
items.desc: Relational modeling, optimized queries, multi-CNPJ control in active production.

items.name: Figma
items.desc: Prototyping, design systems, UX flows, and dev handoff.

items.name: Git
items.desc: Version control, strategic branching, and collaboration in real projects.

steps.label: Problem
steps.desc: A 22-year-old company with zero digital presence. Product catalog didn't exist online. R$0 in digital revenue.

steps.label: Strategy
steps.desc: Full visual rebranding + product photo catalog standardization + 5-platform selection based on ROI potential.

steps.label: Implementation
steps.desc: In-house photo studio built, 200+ items cataloged, optimized listings, brand identity unified across all channels.

steps.label: Result
steps.desc: R$0 to R$10,000 in sales in 3 months. Self-sustaining operation. Brand renewed across 5 marketplaces.

items.label: Building
items.value: Internal multi-CNPJ ERP system for Zenith Lacres

short.title: Front-End Developer | UI/UX | Digital Marketing
short.objective: To work as a Front-End Developer contributing to modern, performant, and conversion-driven interfaces.
short.summary: Front-End Developer with a technical IT degree. Real experience in interfaces, rebranding, marketplaces, and internal systems. Focus on performance, usability, and commercial impact.

skills.frontend: HTML5 · CSS3 · JavaScript · React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
skills.design: Figma · Design System · UI/UX · Canva Pro

bullets: Built frontend of internal multi-CNPJ management platform
Led full company rebranding and visual identity management
R$0 → R$10,000 in digital sales in 3 months
Launched on 5 marketplaces + set up in-house photography studio
